selection_basis: No active frontier_research item exists in operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json. This slice implements the explicit next action recorded by R-031 and does not overwrite another team's queue state.
action: Create a composed browser audio evidence packet contract binding clock acquisition, clock evaluation, route observation, pulse identity, deployed commit, freshness, and optional audibility evidence under one session identifier.
verification: Six deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical implementation and test files before commit.
handoff: Vercel Studio should construct this packet in the same browser session as the direct diagnostic pulse, bind the actual deployed commit, and append a separate device-level or human audibility observation only when independently captured.
next_action: Add a browser adapter that captures the existing Vercel runtime observability objects into this packet without importing Node crypto into the client bundle; use Web Crypto or server-side finalization and preserve the same claim boundary.
